options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: recipe_shuffle
options.description:
Enable production building recipe shuffle. This includes glade events as well, such as the flawless buildings.
Can skip Crude Workstation and/or Makeshift Post for less frustrating seeds.

Options: vanilla, exclude_crude_ws_and_ms_post, exclude_crude_ws, exclude_ms_post, full_shuffle

choices.name: exclude_crude_ws_and_ms_post
choices.display_name: Exclude Crude Ws And Ms Post

options.name: deathlink
options.description:
Enable death link. Can send on villager leaving and/or death.

Options: off, death_only, leave_and_death

options.name: blueprint_items
options.description:
Blueprints are no longer drafted through Reputation like in Vanilla. Instead, they are found as items,
granting them as essential blueprints. This will make the start of a multiworld quite a bit harder,
but the end quite a bit easier.

options.name: continue_blueprints_for_reputation
options.description: Continue to offer blueprint selections as rewards for reputation, even with Blueprint Items on.

options.name: seal_items
options.description:
Shuffle 4 special Seal related items.
You will not be able to complete a stage of the Seal until receiving the relevant item.

options.name: required_seal_tasks
options.description:
Increase the number of tasks you need to complete at each stage of the Seal,
making the final settlement MUCH harder.

options.name: enable_keepers_dlc
options.display_name: Enable Keepers of the Stone DLC
options.description: Enable Keepers of the Stone DLC related locations: Frogs, Coastal Grove, and Ashen Thicket.

options.name: enable_nightwatchers_dlc
options.description: Enable Nightwatchers DLC related locations: Bats, Bamboo Flats, and Rocky Ravine.

options.name: enable_biome_keys
options.description:
Enable biome keys, progression items that prevent you from playing in a biome until
receiving the corresponding key.

options.name: grove_expedition_locations
options.description: Number of locations to place in the Coastal Grove's Strider Port. Will be ignored if DLC is off.

options.name: reputation_locations_per_biome
options.description:
Set the number of locations spread between the 1st reputation and victory (assumed to be at 18) in each biome.

For example, a setting of 1 will put locations at the 1st, 10th, and 18th rep,
while a setting of 4 will put locations at the 1st, 4th, 8th, 11th, 15th, and 18th rep.

This option will be increased before generation with a warning to ensure enough locations for items,
such as with Blueprint Items on.

options.name: extra_trade_locations
options.description: Set the number of extra goods that will be chosen as trade route locations.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
